title: Southern Railway
contentHtml:
ROLLING STOCK CERTIFICATES FOR SOUTHERN RAILWAYS

 

COACH TYPE

 NOV-12 DEC-12 JAN-14 FEB-14 MAR-14 JUNE-14  AUG-16 Sep-16  FEB-19  MAR-19 SEP-19 OCT-19 NOV-19 DEC-19 JAN-20 FEB-20 MAR-20 JUNE-20 JULY-20 AUG-20 OCT-20 JAN-21 DEC-21 FEB-22 MAR-22

Please Note

Rolling Stock Certificate (RSC) is not available after 31.12.2022 on this website due to as per Railway Board letter no-2014/M(C)/141-CMM-I dt-12.07.2022   the Standard Rolling Stock Certificate (SRSC) has been implemented in all PU’s from 01.08.2022 and the same is available on Production Monitoring System (PMS) portal and CMMS Portal.                     Url  id is https://prodmcf.indianrailways.gov.in/MCFRBL/ for PMS portal

and  https://roams.cris.org.in For CMMS   portal.

(This is approval by the competent authority)

this issue related letters 
LFCWAC                                             213904,  204408      
 LWACCN

and  https://roams.cris.org.in For CMMS   portal.
